history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02, column B, facing right. Directly ahead is lava at (2,C), so I cannot move forward. I need to head downward to navigate around the lava. Turning right will make me face down, allowing me to move to (3,B) next.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell (2,B) facing down. The cell directly below (3,B) is floor ('.') and safe. I will move forward to begin my path downward, eventually turning right to head east to avoid lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell (row 3, column B) facing down. The goal is at (8, H). Straight ahead (down) is safe: (4, B) is floor. I need to move down to (4, B) to begin my path. Later I will need to turn east and navigate along row 6, then south to row 8, and finally east to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell (row04, colB) facing down. The cell directly in front (row05, colB) is floor ('.'), so I can move forward safely. My goal is to reach (row08, colH). I plan to go down to row05, then down to row06, then turn left to face right, then move right along row06 to column G, then down to row07 and row08, then right to goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell (5, B) facing down. The goal is at (8, H). The immediate safe cell in front is (6, B). I will move forward to that cell. After that, I will need to turn left to face right in order to move eastward towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 6, column B, facing down. Moving forward would go into lava at (7,B). To reach the goal at (8,H), I need to move right along row 6 towards the safe column G, then down to row 8. So I must first change my orientation to face right. Turning left from facing down gives facing right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06, column B, facing right. The cell directly ahead (row 06, column C) is safe floor (`.`), so I can move forward to begin my path toward the goal. I plan to move east along row 6 to column G, then turn down, approach the goal via row 7 and row 8 at column G, then turn right to reach the goal at row 8, column H.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 6, column C facing right. The goal is at row 8, column H. To reach it, I need to move right along row 6 to column G, then turn down, move down twice to row 8, then turn right and move to H. The next cell forward (row 6, column D) is a floor cell, so I

<thought>
I am at cell (6, C) facing right. The goal is at (8, H). I see a safe path: move east along row 6 to (6, D) then (6, E), etc., then south and east. The cell directly in front (6, D) is floor, so I can move forward safely.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 6 column D facing right. The goal is at row

<thought>
I am at cell (row 06, column D) facing right. The goal is at (08, H). To reach it, I need to move right along row 6 to column G, then turn right and

<thought>
I am at row 6, column D, facing right. The goal is at row 8, column H. To reach it, I need to move right to column G, then go down to row 8, then right to H. The path: move forward to (6,E), then to (6,F), then to (6,G). Then turn right to face down, move forward to (7,G) and then to (8,G). Then turn right to face right, move forward to (8,H). My first action is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 6, column E, facing right ('>'). The goal is at row 8, column H. I see that moving forward to (6,F) is safe (floor). Then I can continue forward to (6,G), turn right to face down, move to (7,G) and (8,G), then turn left to face right and move to goal. So my first step is to move forward to (6,F).
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06, column F, facing east. The goal is at row 08, column H. Moving forward directly to cell (6,G) is safe (empty). From there, I can turn right to face south and proceed down through (7,G) and (8,G), then turn left to reach the goal. The other immediate moves (turning and moving) would lead into lava or walls. So the next action is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 6, column G, facing east. The goal is at row 8, column H. There is lava blocking direct paths. To reach the goal, I need to go south to row 7, column G, then continue south to row 8, column G, then turn east to reach the goal. So first I should turn right to face south.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row06, column G, facing down. The goal is at row08, column H. Moving forward one cell will take me to row07, column G, which is a floor cell (safe). From there I can continue moving down and then turn left to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 7, column G facing down. The goal is at row 8, column H. Directly below me is a floor cell (row 8, col G), and to its right is the goal. I can move forward to (8,G) then turn left to face right and move to the goal. So my next action is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row08 column G facing down (`v`). The goal is directly to the east at row08 column H. To move east, I need to face right. Turning left from facing down will make me face right. After turning, I will move forward into the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08, column G, facing right. The goal is directly to my right at column H. The cell is a goal cell, so I can move forward to reach it.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
